issues.description: Labs UI requires interactive context selection (org + opp picker) before rendering the polished render_code dashboard. Headless walkthrough captures the JSON definition view instead. Live polished render is visible by clicking through https://labs.connect.dimagi.com/labs/workflow/3061/ → Apply Selection → Run Workflow.
